source_pr.title: test: make rand test stable
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fixes https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/15225

### What is changed and how it works?
Make the check condition less strict.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: PR title/body: make rand test stable by making check condition less strict.
failure_signature: PR title/body: make rand test stable by making check condition less strict.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: test: make rand test stable.

evidence: evidence: PR title/body: make rand test stable by making check condition less strict.
evidence: diff relaxes assertion from `sum < 6` to `sum < 24` in TestRand (util/random_test.go).
